sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 64:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 64:1
items.html: The nine Sefirot of the upper light that expand to a coupling by striking on the screen in Malchut so as to raise reflected light are called the “Rosh” [head] of the degree, since these lights come before the screen and the reflected light, and the coarseness of the screen cannot ascend to them (see answer 21).
